texto: That is one of the great gifts of The Evolution of Us. Vulnerability. Christine finds it in the women she interviews, and then offers it openly from herself, too. We learn through her writing to live moment to moment, to embrace our insecurities, and to lean on one another… Lauree Ostrofsky, CPCSimply Leap, LLC
explicacao: Citação de Christine Woodcock sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “That is one of the great gifts of The Evolution of Us. Vulnerability.
